section.title: Perceived Impact of AI
section.description: This section assesses how AI usage has affected your effectiveness across key project performance domains.

questions.text: For each Performance Domain below, if you have used AI, rate the perceived effect of AI on your effectiveness in that domain.
questions.hint: If you selected 'Never' in Section 4 for a domain, please select 'Did Not Use' for that domain below.

rows.label: **Stakeholders**
rows.description: Effectiveness of stakeholder engagement and communications

rows.label: **Team**
rows.description: Effectiveness of team formation, development, and collaboration

rows.label: **Development Approach & Life Cycle**
rows.description: Effectiveness of selecting and tailoring the development approach and life cycle

rows.label: **Planning**
rows.description: Effectiveness of organizing activities and establishing baselines and plans

rows.label: **Project Work**
rows.description: Effectiveness of establishing processes and performing project work

rows.label: **Delivery**
rows.description: Effectiveness of delivering project scope and quality requirements

rows.label: **Measurement**
rows.description: Effectiveness of assessing performance and taking appropriate actions

rows.label: **Uncertainty**
rows.description: Effectiveness of managing risks, ambiguity, and complexity
